economic_notes: Nation has 14 government business enterprises including energy, safety services, contracting, well services, gaming, land holdings, utilities, land development, marketplace, hospitality, cascade power, and communications. GBEs had combined revenue of $65,431,294 and net income of $15,109,401 in 2023. Federal trust funds (Ottawa) of $95,337,697 include oil and gas royalties administered by Government of Canada under Indian Oil and Gas Act.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to asset retirement obligations not being fully estimated or recorded (Note 10). Fiscal year is March 31, 2023, not 2024. Nation has significant Ottawa Trust funds ($95.3M) from oil and gas royalties under Indian Oil and Gas Act. Long-term debt includes both CMHC mortgages ($15,782,556) and a promissory note to First Nations Finance Authority ($42,621,293 net of debt reserve fund). 14 GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis with total equity of $80.5M. Settlement Trust (from 2007 Canada settlement) is NOT consolidated and excluded from financial statements. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC + CMHC + HRD + FNDF government transfers ($33,524,079). Change in equity in investments ($14,665,667) and royalty/trust income may be considered partially own-source. Remuneration schedule not included in provided text.
